I have created the requested Windmill Workflow-as-Code file implementing the fan-out/fan-in pattern.

The workflow is created at `/home/user/windmill-project/f/workflows/report_generator.ts` and a copy is saved to `/logs/artifacts/report_generator.ts` as requested. 

The implementation uses `Promise.all` with `task(fetchSectionData)` for parallel execution (fan-out) and collects the results (fan-in) before aggregating them into the final report with `task(compileReport)`.
